narrative:
Westerville 1-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 634 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.9 percentage points.
